auth.welcomeTitle: Sign in to a world-class code analysis workspace.
auth.welcomeSubtitle: Access clone detection, AST visualization, metrics, AI reporting, grounded follow-up chat, and saved session history from one premium interface.

featureCards.title: Deep code comparison
featureCards.description: Compare pasted snippets, uploaded source files, ZIP projects, or Excel-derived samples in one flow.

featureCards.title: Graph + report workflow
featureCards.description: Review AST structure, metrics, code quality notes, and a polished AI summary in the same session.

featureCards.title: Account-scoped history
featureCards.description: Keep previous analyses organized, searchable, and ready to reopen, rerun, or export.

auth.loginDescription: Enter your account credentials to continue to the comparison workspace.

errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Please use a stronger password.
